one_line: Analyst consensus firmly bullish, institutions already 85.8% in, shorts capitulated — marginal buyer pool is thin
evidence: rec_mean 1.64 across 26 analysts signals broad Wall St consensus long, not a hidden position; 85.8% institutional ownership means the natural buyers are already loaded; 2.11% short interest = bears have given up and there is no squeeze catalyst remaining; +82% V-recovery off the DOJ-probe lows means the re-rating thesis (hate→fair value) is fully priced; RSI 65.9/68.9 elevated but not euphoric, so not EXTREME, but new 52w high after a +25% six-month run confirms momentum chasers are the remaining marginal buyer — a thin and fickle base
